chinese_text: 遵大路兮，摻執子之袪兮。無我惡兮，不寁故也。
translation_text:
Along the highway.
I hold you by the cuff.
Do not hate me ; —
Old intercourse should not be suddenly broken off.
translation_text_raw:
Along the highway.
I hold you by the cuff.
Do not hate me ; —
Old intercourse should not be suddenly broken off.

chinese_text: 遵大路兮，摻執子之手兮。無我魗兮，不寁好也。
translation_text:
Along the high way,
I hold you by the hand.
Do not think me vile ; —
Old friendship should not hastily be broken off.
translation_text_raw:
Along the high way,
I hold you by the hand.
Do not think me vile ; —
Old friendship should not hastily be broken off.
